archetypes.name: runanywhere evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: runanywhere signal changes while fastest context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: fastest boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: fastest handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: device regression harness
archetypes.trigger: device behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: apple operator packet
archetypes.trigger: apple output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
